user.title: ISEO Argo BLE Lock
user.description: Select your lock from the list of nearby ISEO locks, sorted by signal strength. If your lock is not listed, make sure it is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then click Submit to scan again.

bluetooth_confirm.title: ISEO Lock Discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description:
Found a new ISEO lock nearby: **{name}**.

Click **Submit** to begin setup.

gw_register.title: Register Gateway
gw_register.description:
To register Home Assistant as a Gateway:

1. Click **Submit** below.
2. **Within 30 seconds**, scan your physical **Master Card** on the lock.

The lock will blink green once the card is read successfully.

gw_register_logs.title: Enable Gateway Logs
gw_register_logs.description:
To receive real-time log updates, the Gateway needs one more permission:

1. Click **Submit** below.
2. **Within 30 seconds**, scan your physical **Master Card** on the lock.

The lock will blink green once the card is read successfully.

gw_fetch_users.title: Fetch User List
gw_fetch_users.description:
To map your Argo users to Home Assistant accounts, Home Assistant needs to download the lock's whitelist.

1. Click **Submit** below.
2. **Within 30 seconds**, scan your physical **Master Card** on the lock.

The lock will blink green once the card is read successfully.

map_users.title: Link Argo Users to Home Assistant
map_users.description: Select the Home Assistant account for each Argo user found on the lock. Leave a field blank to keep those events anonymous.

data.ignore_all: Skip this step and finish setup

admin_choice.title: Administrative Access
admin_choice.description: Choose how to handle administrative tasks. **Advanced features like managing PIN codes and syncing the user list are ONLY available if you set up an Admin identity.**

admin_setup.title: Setup Admin Identity
admin_setup.description: Home Assistant will create a secure identity to manage your lock. You will need to add this identity to the Argo app and enable the **VIP** and **Login** permissions.

admin_enroll.title: Add to Argo App
admin_enroll.description:
Add the following **ARGO UID** as a new **Phone with ARGO UID** user in the Argo app:

1. Open the **Argo app**, tap your lock, then go to **Users → + → Phone with ARGO UID**
2. Enter a name (e.g. *HA Admin*), copy the UID below and paste it in the app, then tap **Save**
3. Tap the new user and enable **Login** and **VIP** permissions.

⚠️ **The next step will open the lock.** Once you have completed the steps above, click **Submit** to finish setup.

error.no_devices_found: No ISEO locks found nearby. Make sure the lock is powered on and within Bluetooth range, then click Submit to scan again.
error.auth_failed: The lock rejected the request. Ensure you scanned the Master Card while the LEDs were blinking.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the lock. Check it is powered on and within Bluetooth range.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.invalid_admin_identity: The provided admin identity is invalid.

abort.not_iseo_device: This device does not appear to be an ISEO lock.

init.title: Lock Management
init.description: Choose what you would like to manage for this lock.

user_management_refresh.title: Refresh User List
user_management_refresh.description:
To manage user mappings, Home Assistant needs to refresh the user list from the lock.

1. Click **Submit** below.
2. **Within 30 seconds**, scan your physical **Master Card** on the lock.

The lock will blink green once the card is read successfully.

admin_identity.title: Manage Admin Identity
admin_identity.description: Configure an existing Argo Admin Phone identity. This allows Home Assistant to manage users and PINs directly without requiring a Master Card scan for every change.

map_users.title: Link Argo Users to Home Assistant
map_users.description: Select the Home Assistant account for each Argo user below. Leave a field blank to keep those events anonymous. {count} user(s) found.

admin_enroll.title: Add to Argo App
admin_enroll.description:
Add the following **ARGO UID** as a new **Phone with ARGO UID** user in the Argo app:

1. Open the **Argo app**, tap your lock, then go to **Users → + → Phone with ARGO UID**
2. Enter a name (e.g. *HA Admin*), copy the UID below and paste it in the app, then tap **Save**
3. Tap the new user and enable **Login** and **VIP** permissions.

⚠️ **The next step will open the lock.** Once you have completed the steps above, click **Submit** to activate and store the credentials.

options.persistent: Setup a persistent Admin identity (Enables all features)
